changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create sync function and trigger: module_section → section
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION sync_module_section_to_section() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN IF (TG_OP = 'INSERT') THEN INSERT INTO section ( section_id, crf_version_id, label, title, subtitle, instructions, ordinal, parent_id, status_id, owner_id, date_created, date_updated, update_id, borders, page_number_label ) VALUES ( NEW.section_id, NEW.crf_version_id, NEW.label, NEW.title, NEW.subtitle, NEW.instructions, NEW.ordinal, NEW.parent_id, NEW.status_id, NEW.owner_id, NEW.date_created, NEW.date_updated, NEW.update_id, NEW.borders, NEW.page_number_label ); RETURN NEW; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'UPDATE') THEN UPDATE section SET crf_version_id = NEW.crf_version_id, label = NEW.label, title = NEW.title, subtitle = NEW.subtitle, instructions = NEW.instructions, ordinal = NEW.ordinal, parent_id = NEW.parent_id, status_id = NEW.status_id, owner_id = NEW.owner_id, date_created = NEW.date_created, date_updated = NEW.date_updated, update_id = NEW.update_id, borders = NEW.borders, page_number_label = NEW.page_number_label WHERE section_id = OLD.section_id; RETURN NEW; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'DELETE') THEN DELETE FROM section WHERE section_id = OLD.section_id; RETURN OLD; END IF; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
CREATE TRIGGER trg_sync_module_section AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON module_section FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION sync_module_section_to_section();
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sync_module_section ON module_section; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS sync_module_section_to_section();
